content: The primary W3C PNG Third Edition specifies sRGB as one rendering-intent byte (0..3) and fixed associated gAMA/cHRM values; gAMA is a four-byte gamma times 100000; cHRM is eight four-byte xy coordinates times 100000; iCCP has a constrained 1..79-byte Latin-1 profile name, NUL, compression method 0, and zlib-compressed ICC profile whose color space matches PNG color type.
